decisions.name: Cater to kindergarten students and children with Dyslexia
Comply with relevant standards and regulations
Provide an accessible and user-friendly interface
Be scalable to accommodate a large number of users
Comply with relevant data privacy regulations

components.name: Assessment Module
components.responsibility: Conducts precise assessments to identify challenges related to reading and working memory.

components.name: Personalized Tutoring Module
components.responsibility: Delivers AI-driven, one-to-one tutoring experiences tailored to the unique needs of individuals with Dyslexia.

components.name: Language Tutoring Environment
components.responsibility: Provides a comprehensive learning support system with personalized games, activities, and a user interface tailored to the unique needs of individuals with Dyslexia.

components.name: Phonological Awareness Module
components.responsibility: Empowers individuals with Dyslexia in the domain of phonological awareness in the area of language learning.

components.name: User Interface
components.responsibility: Caters to kindergarten students and children with Dyslexia, enhancing reading, spelling, and memorization aspects.

components.name: AI-Driven Engine
components.responsibility: Provides AI-driven, one-to-one tutoring experiences and delivers personalized recommendations based on user performance.

components.name: Health and Quality Metrics
components.responsibility: Tracks and monitors user progress, providing insights into school quality (80%) and health quality (20%) as a secondary factor.

critique.description: The Assessment Module's data flow to the AI-Driven Engine may impact the system's scalability, as increased user demand may lead to a surge in data being processed.
The Personalized Tutoring Module's event flow to the Language Tutoring Environment may impact the system's accessibility, as the user interface may not be user-friendly for individuals with Dyslexia.
The Health and Quality Metrics' data flow to the User Interface may impact the system's data privacy compliance, as user data may be exposed to unauthorized parties.

The AI-Driven Engine's event flow to the User Interface may impact the system's standard compliance, as the user interface may not meet the required accessibility and usability standards for individuals with Dyslexia.
